title: System Prompt Separate Prompts Refactor Tracker

prompts.name: BROWSER_AUTOMATION_PROMPT
prompts.tasklet_equivalent: no equivalent — Tasklet uses Computer Use, not a browser tool
prompts.feedback: Condensed opening into two paragraphs. Flipped clarification rule from 'clarify if vague' to 'always clarify'. Rest unchanged.
changes: Collapsed 'When to clarify first', opening line, and 'When to use browse_website vs web_scrape' into two tight paragraphs
Changed clarification rule from conditional to absolute: always use ask_user_question before calling browse_website

prompts.name: MARKET_DATA_PROMPT
prompts.tasklet_equivalent: no equivalent — Sunder-specific Singapore property market dataset
prompts.feedback: Restructured around the 4 actual datasets. Made OpenAgent scrape mandatory for URA data.
changes: Replaced use-case descriptions with the 4 actual dataset names (agents, transactions, hdb, ura)
Collapsed 'How to use it well' into inline mode descriptions
Changed OpenAgent step from optional ('For richer...') to mandatory ('MUST also scrape') for all private residential queries

prompts.name: PROPERTY_LISTING_PROMPT
prompts.feedback: Simplified to just what each tool returns plus a default platform rule.
changes: Removed use-case bullet lists and routing heuristics
Added what each tool returns as plain descriptions
Added default: use PropertyGuru unless user specifies otherwise

prompts.name: SANDBOX_PROMPT
prompts.tasklet_equivalent: <sandbox> section in Tasklet v2 system prompt
prompts.feedback: No structural drift vs Tasklet. Trimmed filesystem layout repeat from <using-the-filesystem> — layout is already in top-level <filesystem> tag.
changes: Removed duplicate filesystem layout table from <using-the-filesystem>
Kept only sandbox-specific notes: agent/home/ persistence, /tmp/ ephemeral preference

prompts.name: CRM_SETUP_SYSTEM_PROMPT
prompts.tasklet_equivalent: no equivalent — Sunder-specific CRM setup mode
